Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Hearing on claim of exemption. The claim of exemption is granted except for $75 per pay period. Order signed in open court. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
